content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls the build a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), while description.txt has no such language.
Pierre: Apple reviewers read release notes as part of the submission and can reject builds that describe themselves as beta or unfinished, since the App Store is meant for finished software (TestFlight is the beta channel). Here the release notes explicitly say "public beta" and "expect rough edges," which may trigger review questions or rejection. Please rewrite the release notes to describe shipped features/fixes without beta/test language before submitting.
